notableEvents.label: Santiago Espinal GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Santiago Espinal grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Alex Call out at 2nd. Santiago Espinal out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Luis Arraez singles on a line drive to left fielder Alex Call. Luis Arraez to 2nd. Luis Arraez advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by left fielder Alex Call.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
